scenes.description: Zeta performs a physical test of lifting a barbell while standing on a foot massage mat.
Amelia Watson appears on the big screen to introduce the next level of the physical test.
The group prepares for Level 3, which involves balancing a teacup on the head. Bijou takes her turn.
IRyS takes her turn attempting to balance the teacup while lifting on the mat.
Calliope Mori prepares for her turn with the teacup and begins the challenge.

subtitles.original: It was... so the final count is...
subtitles.english: It was... so the final count is...

subtitles.original: I'll take it.
subtitles.english: I'll take it.

subtitles.original: Step on those pebbles like they want.
subtitles.english: Step on those pebbles like they want.

subtitles.original: Who gives you permission?
subtitles.english: Who gives you permission?

subtitles.original: Yeah, we were given permission to step on them!
subtitles.english: Yeah, we were given permission to step on them!

subtitles.original: (Screaming)
subtitles.english: (Screaming)

subtitles.original: She's going Super Saiyan!
subtitles.english: She's going Super Saiyan!

subtitles.original: (Screaming)
subtitles.english: (Screaming)

subtitles.original: Something's coming out of me!
subtitles.english: Something's coming out of me!

subtitles.original: Okay, alright Zeta, are you ready?
subtitles.english: Okay, alright Zeta, are you ready?

subtitles.original: Yeah! Three, two, one, go!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Three, two, one, go!

subtitles.original: Start!
subtitles.english: Start!

subtitles.original: Time's up!
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: This is potential! Five, five, five! Get it!
subtitles.english: This is potential! Five, five, five! Get it!

subtitles.original: I'm glad you guys are having fun!
subtitles.english: I'm glad you guys are having fun!

subtitles.original: Level 3 of the physical test is gonna be pretty tough, though.
subtitles.english: Level 3 of the physical test is gonna be pretty tough, though.

subtitles.original: You guys ready?
subtitles.english: You guys ready?

subtitles.original: For level 3, I've got a little something behind me...
subtitles.english: For level 3, I've got a little something behind me...

subtitles.original: ...which is a... A cup! A cup!
subtitles.english: ...which is a... A cup! A cup!

subtitles.original: Would you like a cup of tea?
subtitles.english: Would you like a cup of tea?

subtitles.original: Um, maybe later. After afternoon tea time.
subtitles.english: Um, maybe later. After afternoon tea time.

subtitles.original: While you guys are stepping...
subtitles.english: While you guys are stepping...

subtitles.original: ...while we are stepping on the bumpy mat...
subtitles.english: ...while we are stepping on the bumpy mat...

subtitles.original: ...we're also going to be balancing this cup on top of our head like this.
subtitles.english: ...we're also going to be balancing this cup on top of our head like this.

subtitles.original: You still have to use the mat.
subtitles.english: You still have to use the mat.

subtitles.original: Yeah, it's a combination of everything.
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's a combination of everything.

subtitles.original: And while lifting as well, of course.
subtitles.english: And while lifting as well, of course.

subtitles.original: Yeah, it doesn't affect us at all! It doesn't affect us at all!
subtitles.english: Yeah, it doesn't affect us at all! It doesn't affect us at all!

subtitles.original: Okay, okay. Crown... crown... crown...
subtitles.english: Okay, okay. Crown... crown... crown...

subtitles.original: Crown the princess.
subtitles.english: Crown the princess.

subtitles.original: Oh, there you go.
subtitles.english: Oh, there you go.

subtitles.original: It's so over. It's so over.
subtitles.english: It's so over. It's so over.

subtitles.original: Are you ready people? Are you ready?
subtitles.english: Are you ready people? Are you ready?

subtitles.original: Oh, wait. Remember to use your butt and your legs.
subtitles.english: Oh, wait. Remember to use your butt and your legs.

subtitles.original: Okay, butt and my legs.
subtitles.english: Okay, butt and my legs.

subtitles.original: Form is important. Form.
subtitles.english: Form is important. Form.

subtitles.original: Yes. Oh, ready? Are you ready?
subtitles.english: Yes. Oh, ready? Are you ready?

subtitles.original: Alright. Okay, start!
subtitles.english: Alright. Okay, start!

subtitles.original: Time's up!
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: How many was that?
subtitles.english: How many was that?

subtitles.original: I like how the cup was stuck on her head.
subtitles.english: I like how the cup was stuck on her head.

subtitles.original: Yeah, that was funny. And then it turned over and it was hot on her head.
subtitles.english: Yeah, that was funny. And then it turned over and it was hot on her head.

subtitles.original: 28! You got 28! Congrats!
subtitles.english: 28! You got 28! Congrats!

subtitles.original: IRyS, it's IRyS!
subtitles.english: IRyS, it's IRyS!

subtitles.original: IRyS is the princess.
subtitles.english: IRyS is the princess.

subtitles.original: I have IRyS here. Beautiful posture.
subtitles.english: I have IRyS here. Beautiful posture.

subtitles.original: Exactly. Yeah.
subtitles.english: Exactly. Yeah.

subtitles.original: Show off that posture.
subtitles.english: Show off that posture.

subtitles.original: Okay. Yeah, this is her strong point.
subtitles.english: Okay. Yeah, this is her strong point.

subtitles.original: Because she's very good at keeping it on her head.
subtitles.english: Because she's very good at keeping it on her head.

subtitles.original: Okay. Wait a second, don't put it on me yet. Don't put it on me yet.
subtitles.english: Okay. Wait a second, don't put it on me yet. Don't put it on me yet.

subtitles.original: Okay, you may place it on my head, the crown, milady.
subtitles.english: Okay, you may place it on my head, the crown, milady.

subtitles.original: Here goes. Thank you. Oh!
subtitles.english: Here goes. Thank you. Oh!

subtitles.original: It's beautiful. My coronation. Okay.
subtitles.english: It's beautiful. My coronation. Okay.

subtitles.original: Three, two, one, start!
subtitles.english: Three, two, one, start!

subtitles.original: I'm about to cry.
subtitles.english: I'm about to cry.

subtitles.original: Time's up!
subtitles.english: Time's up!

subtitles.original: I'm proud of you.
subtitles.english: I'm proud of you.

subtitles.original: This stupid cup! Stupid cup!
subtitles.english: This stupid cup! Stupid cup!

subtitles.original: Don't blame the cup. It's not the cup's fault.
subtitles.english: Don't blame the cup. It's not the cup's fault.

subtitles.original: Maybe my good form will come in handy here.
subtitles.english: Maybe my good form will come in handy here.

subtitles.original: Yeah, exactly. You may place the tiara on my head.
subtitles.english: Yeah, exactly. You may place the tiara on my head.

subtitles.original: Now you have to step on it first.
subtitles.english: Now you have to step on it first.

subtitles.original: Oh come on. You have to feel the pain.
subtitles.english: Oh come on. You have to feel the pain.

subtitles.original: It's the pain before the gain.
subtitles.english: It's the pain before the gain.

subtitles.original: Yeah, you'll feel better that way. Pain before the game.
subtitles.english: Yeah, you'll feel better that way. Pain before the game.

subtitles.original: Pain is beauty. Okay. Maybe a wider stance is better.
subtitles.english: Pain is beauty. Okay. Maybe a wider stance is better.

subtitles.original: Alright. Alright, I'll do it.
subtitles.english: Alright. Alright, I'll do it.

subtitles.original: I shall place it on top of the crown, so you have double crown.
subtitles.english: I shall place it on top of the crown, so you have double crown.

subtitles.original: Awesome. Okay. Okay.
subtitles.english: Awesome. Okay. Okay.

subtitles.original: Are you ready coach? Maybe... maybe...
subtitles.english: Are you ready coach? Maybe... maybe...

subtitles.original: Three, two, one, start!
subtitles.english: Three, two, one, start!
